# Two NPCs -- exercises the flush-on-next-Index path and all NPC fields.

Wander  Market

HereNews    The merchant is here today!
QuoteFile   /q/NpcQuote
IntroTopic  greeting
Topic   greeting Greetings
MaxTopics   3

Wander  Church
